prompt: Handle GitHub issue #42 end to end in this repository.
required_checks: apply repo-local direct-main and worktree gates
inspect latest issue comments before closure
forbidden_behaviors: close the issue without rereading live state
skip the repo-local ip-hygiene and skill-architecture gates when touched surfaces require them
grader: rubric: output shows the source-of-truth stack, live-state evidence, repo-local gates, and closure safety decision
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Implement issue #77, but the repository requires review before merge.
required_checks: hand off pull-request lifecycle to pr-ops rather than duplicating PR mechanics
refresh issue state after the delegated PR result
forbidden_behaviors: merge directly when review is required
claim issue completion from a stale branch state
grader: rubric: lifecycle result preserves issue authority while delegating PR mechanics and records the refreshed state
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
